document_title: Schedule of Base Unit Market Values for Residential, Commercial, and Industrial Lands — Sagada

_meta.act: RA 12001 (Real Property Valuation and Assessment Reform Act), Section 15
notes: Sagada's commercial ladder mirrors the residential ladder — every C-N tier has the same ₱ value as the corresponding R-N tier.
R-5 'Ankileng extension' and R-7 'Ankileng main' are both filed under barangay Ankileng; the modifier is preserved in the description for road-corridor builders.
R-6 / C-6 mentions 'Maduto' as a road segment in Taccong; not a separate barangay.
R-11 (sitios unreached by road, ₱500) has no commercial counterpart — commercial classifications only apply to road-accessible parcels.
